certifications.name: IBM Data Science Methodology
certifications.description: Covers structured approach to data science projects including CRISP-DM methodology, problem formulation, and analytical workflows.

certifications.name: IBM SQL & Relational Databases
certifications.description: Advanced SQL querying, relational database design, and data manipulation with industry-standard tools.

certifications.name: IBM Python for Data Science
certifications.description: Python programming fundamentals for data science including data analysis with Pandas, NumPy, and visualization libraries.

certifications.name: JP Morgan Excel Skills Simulation
certifications.description: Financial modelling and advanced Excel skills in a real-world investment banking simulation environment.

certifications.name: Cloud Computing Essentials
certifications.description: Core cloud computing concepts, service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS), and deployment strategies.

certifications.name: ISO 31000 Risk Management
certifications.description: Risk management framework, principles, and guidelines for enterprise risk assessment and mitigation.
